lyrics.text: Azi mi-am promis
lyrics.translation: 今天，我承诺

lyrics.text: Azi mi-am promis
lyrics.translation: 今天，我承诺

lyrics.text: Azi mi-am promis ca de maine nu ratez nici o sansa
lyrics.translation: 今天，我承诺，未来永远都不再错过任何机会

lyrics.text: Vreau sa iti spun tot ce simt
lyrics.translation: 我多想告诉你

lyrics.text: Langa tine incepe o nou viata.
lyrics.translation: 我要在你身旁开始新的生活

lyrics.text: Si asta-i noaptea in care nu mai visez
lyrics.translation: 而这晚我不再孤单做梦

lyrics.text: Noaptea in care incep sa traiesc
lyrics.translation: 这晚我从新开始生活

lyrics.text: Asta-i noaptea in care vreau sa dansez
lyrics.translation: 这晚我想跳舞

lyrics.text: Sa am distrez doar cu tine...
lyrics.translation: 唯独和你在一起玩得很开心

lyrics.text: Vino langa mine' stiu ca vrei
lyrics.translation: 靠近我，我明白你心意

lyrics.text: Strange-ma in brate pana numar la trei
lyrics.translation: 把我抱在你怀里数到三

lyrics.text: Ritmul meu te cheama' stiu ca poti
lyrics.translation: 我的节奏在呼唤你，我知道你可以

lyrics.text: Cu mine sa dansezi inca doua nopti.
lyrics.translation: 与我共舞两个晚上

lyrics.text: Vino langa mine' stiu ca vrei
lyrics.translation: 靠近我，我知道你心意

lyrics.text: Strange-ma in brate pana numar la trei
lyrics.translation: 把我抱在你的怀里数到三

lyrics.text: Ritmul meu te cheama' stiu ca poti
lyrics.translation: 我的节奏在呼唤你，我知道你可以

lyrics.text: Cu mine sa dansezi inca doua nopti.
lyrics.translation: 与我共舞两个晚上

lyrics.text: Stii cat de mult mi-am dorit sa fim noi doi impreuna
lyrics.translation: 你知道，我是多么想让你我

lyrics.text: Tu esti tot ce-am visat
lyrics.translation: 在一起，你就是我梦想

lyrics.text: vreau sa-mi spui mereu \'Noapte buna!\'.
lyrics.translation: 我想让你对我讲，到永远的晚安

lyrics.text: Si asta-i noaptea in care nu mai visez
lyrics.translation: 而这夜我停止做梦，这夜开始新生活

lyrics.text: Noaptea in care incep sa traiesc
lyrics.translation: 这晚我从新开始生活
